CustomField.description: How the partner is interested in working with Climb-Pause-Lift. Multi-select to match the partner intake form's checkbox UX. Values match Form_Submission__c.Partner_Interest_Type__c exactly.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Captures the partner's selected interests from the intake form. Used to route the inquiry to the appropriate team.
CustomField.label: Partnership Interest

value.fullName: Offering an internship to an athlete
value.label: Offering an internship to an athlete

value.fullName: How my company can work with CPL
value.label: How my company can work with CPL
